name: Core Corporation
summary: Core Corporation provides information and communication technology services in Japan. The company offers system integration services that include embedded and systems development services for home appliances, OA equipment, in-vehicle equipment, facility equipment, and manufacturing equipment, as well as manufacturing, distribution, finance, and public system integration services for various industries and operations. It also provides solutions for various fields, such as security, efficiency, cloud/big data utilization, cloud services, Internet of Things, GNSS, etc.; and data center and cloud center services comprising housing, hosting, cloud, system monitoring/maintenance, backup service, business process outsourcing services, etc. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
